config.description: Manage credit SMS notification switches, templates, sending rules, quiet hours, and do-not-send lists in one place.

fieldTips.blockedCreatorList: Shows teachers currently in the blocked list. Changes from the input take effect after saving the config.
fieldTips.creatorIdentifierList: Enter teacher mobile numbers or IDs separated by commas.
fieldTips.creatorIdentifierListEmail: Enter teacher emails or IDs separated by commas.
fieldTips.creatorIdentifierListPhone: Enter teacher mobile numbers or IDs separated by commas.
fieldTips.creatorList: Enter teacher IDs separated by commas.
fieldTips.dailySmsLimit: After this daily cap is reached, no new SMS will be sent that day.
fieldTips.enabled: Controls whether credit SMS notifications are enabled. Applies only to future notifications.
fieldTips.estimatedDays: Triggers low-balance reminders when the estimated remaining usable days reach this value.
fieldTips.fallbackFixedValue: Falls back to a fixed balance threshold when consumption data is insufficient.
fieldTips.lookbackDays: Number of recent days used to calculate average daily consumption.
fieldTips.minConsumedDays: If valid consumption days are below this value, estimated-day rules are not used.
fieldTips.mobileList: Enter mobile numbers separated by commas.
fieldTips.optedOutCreators: Opt-out lists are generated by the unsubscribe flow and are read-only.
fieldTips.perCreatorPerTypePerDay: Maximum messages generated for the same teacher and notification type per day.
fieldTips.perMobilePerDay: Maximum credit SMS messages sent to the same mobile per day.
fieldTips.quietEnd: Quiet hours end time, for example 08:00.
fieldTips.quietStart: Quiet hours start time, for example 22:00.
fieldTips.smsUnitCost: Used to estimate SMS cost. Actual billing is determined by the SMS provider.
fieldTips.softlimitThreshold: Balance below this value triggers page alerts, SMS reminders, or debug blocking.
fieldTips.templateCode: Select the SMS template used by this notification type. Apply the template after changes to complete validation.
fieldTips.templateSelect: Select the SMS template used by this notification type. Apply the template after changes to complete validation.
fieldTips.thresholds: For example 100,50,10; reminders trigger when balance falls below a configured threshold.
fieldTips.timezone: Timezone used by quiet hours, for example Asia/Shanghai.
fieldTips.windows: For example 7d,3d,1d,0d means 7 days before, 3 days before, 1 day before, and on expiry day.

fields.disableDebug: Block debug when balance is low

inputPlaceholders.blockedCreatorsEmail: Enter teacher email or ID, separated by commas
inputPlaceholders.blockedCreatorsPhone: Enter teacher mobile number or ID, separated by commas

config.invalidConfig: Config could not be saved. Check the form values.

listDialog.blockedCreatorLimit: Add up to {count} teachers at a time.
listDialog.blockedDescription: Search, view, and remove blocked teachers. Changes take effect after saving the config.
listDialog.duplicateBlockedCreators: The input is already in the blocked list.
listDialog.optedOutDescription: Opted-out teachers are read-only. Search by contact or nickname.

config.loadFailed: Notification policy could not be loaded. Refresh and try again.
config.loadRequired: Notification policy has not loaded successfully, so config cannot be saved.
config.masterSwitchDescription: When disabled, no new credit SMS notifications will be generated. Historical records are not affected.

notes.emptyVariables: Within one notification type, variables unused by the actual trigger path are sent as empty strings.
notes.estimatedLowBalance: Remaining-days alerts estimate usable days from average daily consumption; fixed threshold variables are empty.
notes.expiresAtOptional: If the granted credits have no expiration time, the expiration variable is empty.
notes.fallbackLowBalance: When consumption history is insufficient and a fallback threshold is configured, the fixed-balance path is used; fixed variables are populated and estimated variables are empty.
notes.fixedLowBalance: Fixed-balance alerts populate only balance, threshold, and threshold type variables.
notes.unsupportedValidation: Templates that use variables unsupported by the system are blocked during template sync or enabled-config save.
notes.windowSource: The reminder window variable comes from the expiry window config, such as 7d, 3d, 1d, or 0d.

placeholders.tolerance: SMS templates may use only some placeholders; missing unused variables will not block saving or sending.

config.saveStickyHint: Save config changes for them to apply to future notifications.

sectionDescriptions.budget: Controls the daily SMS sending cap and estimates expected cost.
sectionDescriptions.frequency: Limits how many SMS messages the same mobile or teacher can receive in one day.
sectionDescriptions.lists: Teachers in these lists will no longer receive credit SMS messages. Opted-out teachers are generated by the unsubscribe flow and are read-only.
sectionDescriptions.quietHours: During quiet hours, SMS messages will be delayed or skipped according to policy.
sectionDescriptions.softlimit: When the balance is below the protection line, remind teachers and limit further debug usage to prevent continued spend.

templateList.editPlaceholder: Select or enter a template for this type
templateList.error: Provider template list failed to load. Showing locally queried templates or manual input only.
templateList.fallbackManual: SMS provider templates failed to load. Enter a template code manually.
templateList.fallbackWithCache: SMS provider templates failed to load. Showing local cached templates.
templateList.placeholder: Select a template or enter a template code

source.empty: No selectable templates yet. Enter a template code manually.
source.local: Template list is loaded from local cache.
source.provider: Template list is loaded from the SMS provider.

templateSync.syncFailed: Template query failed. Try again later.
templateSync.templateCodeRequired: Enter the SMS template code first.

config.title: SMS Config

typeDescriptions.credit_expiring: Reminds teachers to use credits before they expire.
typeDescriptions.credit_granted: Reminds teachers to check the result after credits are added.
typeDescriptions.low_balance: Reminds teachers when credit balance is below a threshold or estimated usable days are low.

unsavedDialog.description: Leaving this page will discard your changes and restore the last saved configuration.
unsavedDialog.title: Unsaved changes

detail.description: View delivery path, timing, and provider response for this notification record.
detail.title: Notification details

dryRun.description: Estimate how many notifications match the current config. No SMS will be sent.
dryRun.title: Estimate Send

errorReason.blacklisted: Teacher is in the do-not-send list, not sent.
errorReason.budget_daily_sms_limit: Daily SMS budget has been reached.
errorReason.expiry_extended: Credit expiry was extended before delivery.
errorReason.frequency_creator_type_daily: Daily limit for this teacher and notification type has been reached.
errorReason.frequency_mobile_daily: Daily limit for this mobile has been reached.
errorReason.invalid_mobile: Teacher mobile is invalid, not sent.
errorReason.missing_mobile: Teacher mobile is empty, not sent.
errorReason.opt_out: Teacher has opted out, not sent.
errorReason.policy_disabled: Notification policy is disabled, not sent.
errorReason.provider_failed: SMS provider did not return an accepted response.
errorReason.quiet_hours: Quiet hours are active, not sent.
errorReason.zero_balance_missing_estimated_remaining: Zero balance reminder lacks estimated remaining days, not sent.

loadError: Credit notification data could not be loaded. Refresh and try again.

overview.failedTooltip: Notifications that failed at the SMS provider and can be requeued from the detail list.
overview.pendingTooltip: Notifications created and waiting to be sent or processed.
overview.sentTooltip: Notifications successfully submitted to the SMS provider and marked as sent.
overview.skippedTooltip: Notifications not sent because of contact issues, policy limits, duplicates, or changed trigger conditions.
overview.totalTooltip: All credit SMS notification records generated by the system.

subtitle: Inspect credit grant, expiry, and low-balance notification delivery, and configure SMS policy.
title: Credit Notifications
